fields.description: Schema fieldname whose submitted value triggers this transition (e.g. next_steps, visit_status).
fields.label: On Field

fields.description: The value of On Field that fires this rule (e.g. Schedule Demo).
fields.label: On Value

fields.description: The next activity type to raise as an open task when this rule fires. Blank = no task (terminal outcome).
fields.label: Then Create Task

fields.description: Schema fieldname whose datetime value becomes the new task's due date (e.g. demo_at). Blank = a default lead time.
fields.label: Due From Field

fields.description: Lead stage (CRM Lead Status) to set when this rule fires. Blank = leave the stage unchanged.
fields.label: Set Lead Stage
